message:
feat(service,transport): cooperative yielding for retry and collect_to_set

Add per-poll cooperative budgets to two more hot paths:

- retry.rs: RETRY_COOPERATIVE_BUDGET (1024) prevents an always-ready
  inner service combined with an immediate retry policy from
  monopolizing one executor turn burning through a long retry chain.
  After 1024 completed retry attempts in a single poll, the future
  yields with a self-wake. Includes test with a FailingService that
  exceeds the budget, verifying the yield and subsequent completion.

- transport/stream.rs: COLLECT_TO_SET_COOPERATIVE_BUDGET (1024) for
  CollectToSetFuture, which collects symbols into a SymbolSet. An
  always-ready upstream stream could previously cause unbounded work
  in a single poll. Now yields after 1024 collected symbols with a
  self-wake. Includes AlwaysReadySymbolStream test verifying partial
  collection across two polls.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
